import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_flatten_nested_list():
    """Test that flatten correctly flattens nested lists to scalar values."""
    result = list(source.flatten([1, [2, 3], [[4]]]))
    assert result == [1, 2, 3, 4]
    # Ensure no generator objects are present
    assert all(not isinstance(x, type(source.flatten([]))) for x in result)
